arguments.argument:
event_inherited() fadeColor=c_white
textColorA=make_color_rgb(0,64,61) displayAlpha=1 displayTime=210 bDisplayResults=global.bBossResultShow bDisplayNewRecord=global.bossResultNewRecord global.bBossResultShow=0 global.bossResultNewRecord=0
playerCheatedProg=0 playerCheatedTime=0
if global.bossResultTime=2222222 { playerCheatedProg=1 }
